Build-Depends-Arch: cargo, rustc, libstd-rust-dev, asciidoc, xmlto, git, docbook2x, libcurl4-openssl-dev, libssl-dev, librust-anyhow-dev, librust-anstyle-dev, librust-bstr-dev, librust-bzip2-dev, librust-clap-dev (>= 4.6), librust-ctrlc-dev, librust-curl-dev, librust-encoding-rs-dev, librust-flate2-dev, librust-gix-dev (>= 0.83), librust-indexmap-dev, librust-is-terminal-dev, librust-jiff-dev (>= 0.2.1), librust-serde-dev, librust-serde-json-dev, librust-strsim-dev, librust-tar-dev, librust-tempfile-dev, librust-termcolor-dev, librust-thiserror-dev, librust-winnow-dev (>= 0.7)
